offer: For freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual invoicing causes cash flow gaps. We automate invoice generation and sending instead of manual invoicing through QuickBooks.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for QuickBooks freelancers
Engage on Indie Hackers about invoicing solutions
DM outreach to freelancers with demo video
Participate in forums for QuickBooks users
try_it: Let users try template-based invoice generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the invoicing process
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for invoices
Allow CSV import for existing invoice data
Streamline onboarding steps for new users
